nodes.label: Full Effects/Automation Engine (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Design doc's Effects sections are empty headers; no spec exists to build. Phase D ships minimal conditions as the interim; the real engine (trigger, duration, per-roll riders, advantage propagation) waits for a real design.

nodes.label: PDF Export (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Design-doc feature orthogonal to the TLC system; needs a renderer decision (Grover/Prawn). Serializer already exposes the full sheet.

nodes.label: Live Read-only Share Links (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Needs a public-token route + filtered serializer; security review required for the unauthenticated read path.

nodes.label: Offline-first / Autosave Queue (deferred)
nodes.rationale: SolidJS SPA is online-only today; offline-first is an architecture project, not a feature.

nodes.label: XP Banks / Transfers / Retirement Refunds (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Session-based leveling bookkeeping across players; needs a per-player ledger on campaigns. The chapter-cap soft warning (Phase C) covers table needs meanwhile.

nodes.label: Encumbrance (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Design doc's own Future list: options toggle, backpack/stored weight rules, Powerful Build interaction.

nodes.label: Dice Roller (deferred)
nodes.rationale: Design doc's own Future list; physical dice assumed for now.

nodes.label: DESIGN.md via design-consultation (deferred)
nodes.rationale: No design system file exists; Phase 2 review capped Design System alignment at 6/10 without it.
